creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
Anytime a Port depends on databases/firebird25-client I am prompted for its configuration. For some reason firebird25-client's saved configuration doesn't seem to be recognized:

$ ls /var/db/ports | grep -i databases
databases_db5
databases_firebird25-client
databases_fpc-ibase
databases_fpc-mysql
databases_fpc-odbc
databases_fpc-oracle
databases_fpc-postgres
databases_fpc-sqlite
databases_freetds
databases_gdbm
databases_libiodbc
databases_mysql55-client
databases_postgresql93-client
databases_ruby-bdb
databases_sqlite2
databases_sqlite3
databases_tdb
databases_unixODBC

The config is saved but it still prompts me. Not a huge bug, just kind of annoying. Not sure if it's actually related to the Port or the system.

$ uname -rsip 
FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE amd64 GENERIC
